description: 50% of annual profits distributed to members based on contribution
Major decisions require 75% member approval for implementation
Minimum order value is Rs 5000 for all wholesale orders
Every batch of 50 pieces must pass quality inspection
New members must complete 2 week training program before starting
30 day net payment terms for bulk buyers, 15 days for others
5% discount for orders above Rs 10000, 10% above Rs 25000
All production waste must be recycled, composted, or reused
All members paid minimum wage of Rs 500/day or Rs 15000/month
Minimum 75% attendance required for monthly bonuses
Safety protocols must be followed in workshop and production areas
Financial reports shared monthly with all members via portal
10% discount for orders above Rs 25000, 15% above Rs 50000
Use eco-friendly raw materials when possible, preference to local
Designers get 5% royalty on sales of their original designs
Free delivery for orders above Rs 10000, Rs 200 delivery fee below
Returns accepted within 7 days of delivery for quality issues
Products must meet ISO 9001 quality standards
Each production team must have designated team leader
Minimum 25% of annual profit reinvested in cooperative
All raw materials must be from ethical and conflict-free sources
All members have voting rights and access to cooperative records
Maximum 8 hours per day, 45 hours per week, overtime optional
Disputes resolved through internal mediation committee
2% of revenue allocated to innovation and R&D fund
Promote diversity in hiring, equal opportunity for all
Member data and financial information kept confidential and secure
Annual skill development program for all members
Cooperatives should actively engage with local community
Annual external financial audit required
